models.name: Market Risk VaR Model
models.description: Market risk Value-at-Risk model implementing three methodologies: historical simulation (250-day), parametric delta-normal, and Monte Carlo Cholesky. Primary capital model under 12 CFR 3.132. 99% confidence, 1-day horizon.

findings.description: Look-back window sensitivity not stress-tested; 250-day window may understate risk in low-vol regimes
Parametric method assumes normality; fat-tail correction not applied

models.name: Stressed Value-at-Risk
models.description: Stressed VaR using GFC 2007-2009 historical window. 10-day 99% SVaR added to VaR for total IMA market risk capital under Basel 2.5.

findings.description: Stressed period identification not re-certified annually; last review 2024-01

models.name: FRTB Standardised Approach
models.description: FRTB sensitivity-based standardised approach: delta/vega/curvature sensitivities, RRAO, DRC for non-securitisation credit. Eliminates parallel IMA/SA dual-track under Basel IV.

findings.description: Curvature risk aggregation not validated against vendor benchmark
RRAO treatment for path-dependent exotics not documented
DRC jump-to-default recovery rate assumptions not disclosed

models.name: Black-Scholes-Merton Options
models.description: Closed-form European option pricing under GBM. Full Greeks (delta/gamma/vega/theta/rho/charm). Flat volatility surface. Deep OTM options classified IFRS 13 Level 3.

findings.description: Flat volatility surface; no smile/skew calibration implemented
No discrete dividend handling; continuous yield approximation only

models.name: Hull-White 1F Rate Model
models.description: Mean-reversion short-rate model calibrated to OIS term structure. Analytical ZCB and swaption pricing. Used for IRS valuation and PFE exposure simulation.

findings.description: Single-factor limitation: cannot capture twist or curvature yield curve moves
Calibration to US2Y/US10Y only; US5Y/US30Y not in objective function

models.name: SOFR / LMM Term Rate Model
models.description: SOFR compounding-in-arrears mechanics and Term SOFR CME reference. LMM calibrated to SOFR cap/floor market. LIBOR cessation fallback waterfall per ISDA 2020 protocol.

findings.description: Basis risk between SOFR and Fed Funds not modelled
Term SOFR use cases not pre-approved by ARRC; documentation gap
LMM cap/floor calibration uses pre-LIBOR vol surface proxy

models.name: IFRS 9 Expected Credit Loss
models.description: Stage 1/2/3 ECL on 50-obligor loan portfolio. TTC PD from Moody's ratings, collateral-adjusted LGD, committed EAD with CCF. Macro overlay: GDP/unemployment satellite model.

findings.description: Macro satellite model GDP coefficient not backtested post-COVID

models.name: AML Transaction Monitoring
models.description: Rule-based AML transaction monitoring: 6 rule typologies (sanctions, large-tx, structuring, velocity, round-number, unusual pattern). Threshold-based, target alert rate <2%, SAR conversion >15%.

findings.description: No transaction network analysis; network-based typologies not covered
Velocity limits static; not dynamically adjusted by customer segment

models.name: Correlation Regime Model
models.description: 2-state HMM-proxy regime model. Regime indicator: 20-day realized equity-credit correlation. NORMAL 6×6 matrix (ρ_eq-eq=0.60) and STRESS matrix (ρ_eq-eq=0.90, ρ_eq-cr=-0.80). Used in VaR Monte Carlo.

findings.description: Single regime boundary; no partial-stress intermediate state modelled

models.name: Credit Valuation Adjustment
models.description: Bilateral credit valuation adjustment for OTC derivatives. Prices counterparty credit risk using Monte Carlo simulation of exposure profiles combined with market-implied default probabilities.

findings.description: Stressed CVA not computed; only unstressed CVA reported
Wrong reversal rate model claim (30 steps, should be 200)
SA-CVA capital charge calculation not documented

models.name: Funding Valuation Adjustment
models.description: Funding cost of uncollateralised derivatives positions.

models.name: Margin Valuation Adjustment
models.description: Cost of initial margin under Uncleared Margin Rules using ISDA SIMM.

models.name: Collateral Valuation Adjustment
models.description: Value of optionality in multi-currency CSA collateral posting.

models.name: PFE/CCR Exposure Engine
models.description: Foundational Monte Carlo exposure simulation: 59-factor correlated paths (HW2F IR x 5 curves, GBM FX x 10, Heston EQ x 12, CIR credit x 15). Outputs EE, PFE97.5%, EPE, ENE with full collateral simulation.

findings.description: Risk-neutral vs real-world measure distinction not documented
Factor count error: 47 claimed, actual 59
No full SA-CCR IR three-bucket aggregation
500-path intraday run statistical reliability not assessed
Backtesting methodology incorrect (max-over-1yr not horizon-by-horizon)
IMM approval gap analysis not documented
Stressed EPE methodology missing
Full P-measure simulation not implemented in production
1-year parallel run (SA-CCR vs IMM) not completed
